message:
fix(ui): Shorten example path to fit within welcome box border

The unzip example command was 76 characters, exceeding the 75-character
content width of the welcome box, causing text to touch the right border.

Before: unzip ~/Downloads/twitter-2026-01-09-*.zip -d /data/projects/my_twitter_data
After:  unzip ~/Downloads/twitter-*.zip -d ~/my_twitter_data

The shortened path is also more universally applicable as an example.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
